completion_summary: Reviewed 4 laws: PL-014-091 and PL-015-094 are usable standalone general-permanent enactments with note-only provisions and no concrete U.S.C. rewrite target; PL-015-095 remains historical-only because the source is unrecoverable; PL-015-107 is historical-only and later-repealed.

laws.title: Public Law 14-91 | Military Code of Military Justice Reform Act of 2023
laws.status_basis: The source is readable and the act is a standalone general-permanent military-justice measure, but it does not express a concrete current U.S.C. target. Treat the provisions as statutory-note material only.

provisions.exact_change: Preserve as note material; no direct Code rewrite is identified.
provisions.evidence: "Uniform Code of Military Justice Reform Act of 2023"

provisions.text_summary: Definition tying the act to the proposed UCMJ framework.
provisions.exact_change: Preserve the definition as note material.

provisions.text_summary: Severability plus a supercession clause that limits later laws unless they expressly override this act.
provisions.exact_change: Keep the saving clause as historical note material only.

provisions.text_summary: Immediate application of the revised military-justice framework to the armed forces.
provisions.exact_change: Preserve the operational instruction as note material only.
provisions.evidence: "immediately applied to all branches of the U.S Armed Forces"
provisions.notes: No concrete Code section is named.

provisions.exact_change: Preserve the findings and enactment clause as note material.
provisions.evidence: "Uniform Code of Military Justice is an essential component"
provisions.notes: The source uses duplicated section numbering, so this should stay as concise history.

current_implementation.detail: The enactment is reviewable, but the recovered materials do not identify a concrete U.S.C. anchor for a live XML operation.

recommended_actions: Preserve the act as note material if a statutory-note anchor is assigned later.
Do not invent a direct Title 10 rewrite from the source text.

laws.title: Public Law 15-94 | Whistleblower Protections Act of 2023
laws.status_basis: The scanned PDF is usable and the enactment is a standalone general-permanent whistleblower measure, but it does not express a concrete current U.S.C. target. Treat the provisions as statutory-note material only.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, severability, effective date, and repeal of H.R. 8024.
provisions.exact_change: Preserve the introductory and repeal language as note material only.
provisions.evidence: "Whistleblower Protections Act"; "H.R. 8024 shall be repealed in its entirety"

provisions.text_summary: Definition of whistleblower tied to reporting protected tips.
provisions.exact_change: Preserve the definition as note material.
provisions.evidence: "Whistleblower" shall refer to any citizen who submits a tip
provisions.notes: No explicit U.S.C. citation appears in the source.

provisions.text_summary: Documentation, anti-retaliation, voiding of restrictive agreements, confidentiality, protected disclosures, and recipient list.
provisions.exact_change: Preserve the protections and disclosure rules as note material only.
provisions.evidence: "retaliatory action"; "shall be considered void"; "keep the information not accessible to the public"
provisions.notes: The recovered source is complete enough to support the protection rules, but no Code target is named.

current_implementation.detail: The rendered PDF is readable, but the source does not identify a concrete current U.S.C. anchor for a live XML operation.

recommended_actions: Preserve the act as statutory-note material only.
Do not invent a direct Title 5 or Title 18 rewrite from the source.

laws.title: Public Law 15-95 | An Act to Repeal the White House Protection Act
laws.status_basis: The source is deleted or not found, so only historical treatment is possible.

provisions.text_summary: Source-limited repealer preserved only as history.
provisions.exact_change: Keep the enactment as historical record only.
provisions.notes: No operative text can be verified.

current_implementation.detail: The law is recorded as repealed, but the source bundle is unrecoverable, so no substantive codification can be verified.

recommended_actions: Do not infer operative text from the missing source.
